vs-code-ext-express-api-get-actions 🚀

Generate Express.js GET methods directly from the VS Code Title Bar.

Node.js Express.js VS Code Extension CRUD API

Step 1

Select tallyServer

Step 2

Select Any one for get

⚡ Features

GET Generator

Generate GET methos instantly.

🛠️ Available Commands

Command Description
get Create GET method

🚀 Generated GET Method

router.get("/", async (req, res) => { res.json({ success: true }); });
